name: Mushroom Party Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onion and garlic in oil.
2. Add mushrooms; saute about 2 minutes and drain off liquid.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Add softened cream cheese and Worcestershire sauce; mix together.
5. Cut crusts from loaf of bread.
6. Flatten bread slices with your hand or with a rolling pin.
7. Spread mushroom mixture on each slice of bread.
8. Roll up bread slices.
9. Place rolls on foil or freezer wrap.
10. Lay each log end to end to form a long roll.
11. Freeze at least overnight.
12. To serve, slice the roll into small one-half inch round pieces.
13. Broil for 5 minutes or until crisp.
14. Serve hot.
